data.summary: Drafting Q1 sales report email to the leadership team with headline metrics and key trends.

fields.label: Subject
fields.value: Q1 2026 Sales Report — $1.84M closed, +14% vs Q4

fields.label: Body
fields.value:
Hi team,

Sharing the Q1 2026 sales report — strong quarter overall, with revenue closing at $1.84M (up 14% vs Q4 2025) on 412 orders and 27 new customers. Quote conversion ticked up to 38% (+4 pts) and AOV held steady at $4,466.

Top growth came from Pacific Goods (+24%), Riverstone LLC (+18%), and Magnolia Home & Garden (+12%) — together those three accounts contributed roughly 16% of Q1 revenue. Weekly trend was steady through the quarter, with Wk 11–13 setting the high-water mark at $185K.

Full dashboard is attached for the deep-dive. Happy to walk through it in our next leadership sync — flag anything you want me to drill into ahead of that.

Thanks,
Heman

closingText.text: Q1 report email drafted — leads with the headline number, calls out the top three growth accounts, and points to the dashboard for the full breakdown. Want me to make it shorter, switch to a more casual tone, or send it as-is?
